summary: TWO_COLUMN: fixed v on left plane, ValueTracker θ rotates a length-2.5 w through 360°; the dashed perpendicular drop and the yellow projection arrow on v redraw via always_redraw. Right column shows live θ, the dot v·w, and a mini-axes plot of v·w(θ) = 7.5cos(θ) with a moving dot tracking the current value.
